component.name: btn_DDM_App_MenuHide
component.displayFormat: |!LV_Std_btn_Format!|, Height = 20, HorizontalAlignment = Left, IsVisible = |!IV_DDM_App_DispHide_MenuBtn!|, LabelPosition = Right, VerticalAlignment = Top

component.name: btn_DDM_App_MenuShow
component.displayFormat: |!LV_Std_btn_Format!|, Height = 20, HorizontalAlignment = Left, IsVisible = |!IV_DDM_App_DispShow_MenuBtn!|, LabelPosition = Right, VerticalAlignment = Top

component.name: lbl_DDM_DynDB_Hdr
component.displayFormat: LabelFontFamily = Arial, LabelFontSize = 20, LabelItalic = True, LabelTextColor = XFMediumDarkBlueText, MarginLeft = 10, Width = Auto
